prompt: Premium studio product shot of an AITX ALL-IN-ONE portable travel charger / power bank, three-quarter hero angle. This is an all-in-one: it has a BUILT-IN short Lightning cable AND a BUILT-IN short USB-C cable that tuck into channels in the body, PLUS fold-out AC wall-plug prongs that flip out from the back so it plugs straight into a wall outlet. Show the built-in cables and the fold-out wall prongs clearly. Matte black anodized aluminum body, a subtle embossed orange AITX open-arms mark (from the reference), small LED charge indicators. Clean light-grey studio background, soft shadow. Looks like a high-end all-in-one travel charger.
